dialogueLines.dialogueText: It looks like capitalism’s greatest defenders have descended on the saloon.
Even though it is far above your non-existent paygrade, good luck out there kid.
You’re first fighting that hog dude. Ugh, don’t get too close to him.
I think his secret weapon to kill us is spreading the swine flu onto us.
Huh nice. Congrats for not dying.
Next up is that miner guy. I guess they feel like expanding to fracking.
I heard that the miner is divorced from the CEO of this company, but still works under her for… reasons.
I’m not the type to kink shame, but that just seems like a humiliation ritual to me.
Geez kid, you’re going crazy. I didn’t think you’d make it this far.
Those magicians might be the equalizer, though.
I’m a man of science, but even their magic scares me.
Good luck kid. Hopefully they’ll get distracted making out mid-fight.
Science wins over sorcery once again. Hopefully their relationship survives this.
Ok, that arsonist-in-training Ash is the last of Granny’s goons left.
If she grows plants, but then burns them down, would she be considered an eco-warrior or eco-terrorist?
Whatever, same difference. Make that botanist bow down!
This is it kid. All that’s left is Granny.
I’ll be honest, I had no faith initially that we’d stand any chance against Granny.
You proved me wrong, kid. You gave me hope. Thanks for that.
Alright, don’t let that hope be misplaced! Finish this Duke!
We lived; my will-writing awaits another day.
You single handedly took down the embodiment of capitalism in this town.
Marx would be proud.
